name: renn-copilot
description: Self-contained CLIProxyAPI dashboard + BYOK model sync for GitHub Copilot Chat, entirely inside VS Code -- no separate terminal or browser tab needed.

commands.title: Renn Copilot: Sync Models from Dashboard
Renn Copilot: Copy API Key to Clipboard
Renn Copilot: Show Provider Account Health

rennCopilot.backendUrl.description: Base URL of the renn-copilot backend (the same one the dashboard talks to).

rennCopilot.autoSyncOnStartup.description: Automatically sync enabled models into Copilot's BYOK setting when VS Code starts.

rennCopilot.autoStartBackend.description: Automatically start the renn-copilot backend when VS Code starts. Disable to start it manually via "Renn Copilot: Start Backend".

rennCopilot.autoStartServer.description: Automatically start the CLIProxyAPI server once the backend is up (same as clicking "Start" on the Overview page). Only takes effect once the binary has been installed at least once; has no effect if rennCopilot.autoStartBackend is disabled.

rennCopilot.requireApiKey.description: Whether the Custom Endpoint provider requires an API key. Off by default since several VS Code builds never show a prompt to enter one (causing every chat request to fail with 401) -- the backend runs without proxy authentication instead. Turn on if your VS Code build does prompt for the key and you'd rather keep the proxy authenticated.

scripts.package: npm run backend:install && npm run webview:install && npm run webview:build && vsce package --allow-missing-repository
